CREATE TABLE test_crc32 (id UInt32, data String);
INSERT INTO test_crc32 VALUES (1, 'Hello World'), (2, 'This is a test string for CRC32IEEE'), (3, 'Test'), (4, 'Boundary String'), (5, '');
SELECT data, CRC32IEEE(data) AS crc32_result FROM test_crc32;
SELECT id, CRC32IEEE(data) AS crc32_result FROM test_crc32 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, CRC32IEEE(CONCAT(data, ' appended string')) AS crc_with_append FROM test_crc32;
CREATE TABLE test_crc32_nested AS SELECT id, data FROM test_crc32;
SELECT id, CRC32IEEE(data) FROM (SELECT data FROM test_crc32_nested) AS subquery WHERE id = 2;
WITH (SELECT max(id) FROM test_crc32) AS max_id SELECT id, CRC32IEEE(data) FROM test_crc32 WHERE id = max_id;
SELECT CRC32IEEE(data) FROM (SELECT data FROM test_crc32 WHERE LENGTH(data) > 20) AS long_strings;
CREATE TABLE crc_output AS SELECT id, CRC32IEEE(data) AS crc32_result FROM test_crc32;
SELECT t1.id, t1.data, t2.crc32_result FROM test_crc32 AS t1 JOIN crc_output AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;
SELECT CRC32IEEE(CONCAT(data, ' - hash')) FROM test_crc32 WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_crc32 WHERE id < 3);
SELECT id, CRC32IEEE(data) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT data FROM test_crc32) AS unique_strings;
INSERT INTO test_crc32 VALUES (6, 'Another example string for CRC32IEEE test.');
SELECT CRC32IEEE(NULLIF(data, '')) AS crc_result FROM test_crc32;
